title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals · Transfer Evaluation
summary: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a versioned prompt evaluation harness with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define the user, task, decision, acceptable output, and material failure modes before drafting a prompt.
Turn subjective quality goals into observable criteria and representative test cases.
Create a minimal baseline prompt before adding scaffolding or examples.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.
